title: Vlads Enhanced Vanilla
description: A Modern, beautiful and lightweight Vanilla+ experience.
body: # Vlad's Enhanced Vanilla **A Modern, Lightweight Vanilla+ Modpack!** With beautiful terrain that still feels vanilla, many QoL features? Theres quite a bit to do! ![A Village illuminated by the sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5AhimRoS/images/3318e7418be0ca5f5253250917a081e2122aa199.png) ## Features! - New Terrain generator running Ecospherical Expansion! - New combat running Combatify! - Bedrock features have been brought to java by Bedrockify! - Great terrain and even better performance! - Modern and Lightweight! ![River Cutting through the mountains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5AhimRoS/images/2eda41ecdc6269cc27fb2cdcc66e2bdd6112d24b.png) ![Snowcapped Peaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5AhimRoS/images/43f143da44acdf8ef59d08a28f330f7041e290f4.png) **Like this project? Check out my other projects [here!](https://modrinth.com/user/raamviot50)** # Need a server? ### If you're searching for reliable server hosting, look no further than BisectHosting! Use raamviot50 to get 25% off your first month of any gaming server as a new customer. Their 24/7 support and quick response times guarantee a smooth gaming experience. ![BisectHosting Partnership](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/5f7dc2e0-4bed-4190-b2c4-0c3084ce5da4.webp)
